---
title: "TARGET-UK: Blank Report Template for Editing"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    self_contained: true
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%d %B %Y')`"
params:
  report_start_date: !r Sys.Date() - 365
  report_end_date: !r Sys.Date()
  report_organs: ["Liver", "Lung", "Kidney", "Adrenal", "Other"]
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
/* Screen and print shared */
body { font-size: 14px; }
table { 
  font-size: 13px; 
  width: 100% !important;
  table-layout: auto;
}
th, td { 
  padding: 4px 8px !important;
  font-size: 13px;
}
img { max-width: 100% !important; height: auto !important; }

/* Print-specific: force landscape and control margins */
@media print {
  @page { 
    size: A4 portrait;
    margin: 8mm 6mm 8mm 6mm;
  }
  body { 
    font-size: 11px;
    width: 198mm;
  }
  table {
    font-size: 10px;
    page-break-inside: avoid;
    table-layout: auto;
  }
  th, td { padding: 2px 4px !important; font-size: 10px; }
  img, .plot { 
    max-width: 196mm !important; 
    width: 196mm !important;
    height: auto !important;
    page-break-inside: avoid;
  }
  .figure { 
    max-width: 196mm !important;
    page-break-inside: avoid;
  }
  h2 { page-break-before: auto; }
}
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(out.width = "100%")
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.width = 10, fig.height = 5, dpi = 120)
options(knitr.table.format = "html")
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(purrr)
library(kableExtra)

report_start_date <- params$report_start_date
report_end_date   <- params$report_end_date
report_organs     <- params$report_organs

reportStart <- as.Date(report_start_date)
reportEnd   <- as.Date(report_end_date)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Remove dummy patients and apply organ filter once, producing a clean base
# data frame, then split into per-year slices.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
cleanBase <- function(data) {
  d <- data |>
    filter(!(ID %in% c("000-1", "00000-1", "000000-1")))
  if (!("All" %in% report_organs)) {
    d <- d |> filter(Organ %in% report_organs)
  }
  d
}

rxWaitClean <- cleanBase(rxWaitData)
rxDoneClean <- cleanBase(rxDoneData) |>
  filter(!(Ref_DTT == 0 & DTT_Rx == 0)) # This is a special fix to exclude for those cases which don't have a referral date, resulting in these zero entries


```
**Report Generated on:** `r format(Sys.time(), "%a %b %d %X %Y")`<br>
**Report Period:** `r format(report_start_date, "%d %B %Y")` – `r format(report_end_date, "%d %B %Y")`<br>
**Organs included in report:** `r paste(report_organs)`<br>

```




## Credits

```{r reportLogo, warning=FALSE}
logo_src <- here("www", "TARGETPlotterLogo.png")
if (file.exists(logo_src)) {
  knitr::include_graphics(normalizePath(logo_src))
} else {
  cat("<!-- TARGETPlotterLogo.png logo not available -->")
}
```

<br>
Report Report Developers: xxx <br>
TARGET-UK Lead: Dr. Paul Lyon, FRCR
